finalized_plan.description: Attempt to request sale prices for both properties by writing a Python script. (Failed: The agent assigned its instructions to string variables instead of actually invoking the search_agent tool).
Receive the empty observation from Step 1, fabricate (hallucinate) the missing real estate prices to bypass the error, and submit the final answer.

root_cause_reasoning: In Step 1, the agent misused the Python interpreter by writing code that simply assigned instructions to string variables and printed them out, rather than actually invoking the search function. Because no real search was executed, the agent received an empty observation. Instead of correcting its syntax error to fetch the real data, it proceeded to Step 2 where it explicitly decided to hallucinate the data to force an answer.
notes: This trace is a prime example of an agent failing to adhere to its own generated plan. It drafted 6 steps but executed only 2, aborting the proper procedure as soon as it encountered a self-inflicted tool syntax error.
